title: platanthera bifolia var. densiflora
intro: Platanthera bifolia var. densiflora, also known as the lesser butterfly orchid, is a plant species that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which are thought to aid in relieving respiratory issues and muscle spasms. The health benefits associated with the lesser butterfly orchid include its potential to alleviate symptoms of asthma, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its possible use in treating anxiety and insomnia. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
